## Definition Of Ready (story-level)

- [ ] Story follows the As / I want / So that form.
- [ ] All ACs in testable form.
- [ ] Module assigned.
- [ ] Trace links present.
- [ ] INVEST check:
  - [ ] Independent (or dependencies declared).
  - [ ] Negotiable.
  - [ ] Valuable to a user or business outcome.
  - [ ] Estimable.
  - [ ] Small.
  - [ ] Testable.
- [ ] Open questions resolved or explicitly deferred.

## Definition Of Done (story-level, BA scope)

- [ ] Product owner accepted.
- [ ] Tech lead confirmed buildable.
- [ ] Cross-checked against BRD parent and glossary.
- [ ] Wireframes (if applicable) linked.
- [ ] Traceability row updated.
